summary: Agents Panel (/crm/agentes) testing complete. 26/26 backend tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed. 8 agents displayed with stats, pause/activate, timeline, config, metrics, and approval queue all working. Regression tests for /crm/logistica and /crm/ajustes/gls passed.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/agents/panel/overview returns 8 agents with estado, acciones_hoy, tasa_exito_7d, tools_count + resumen global
POST /api/agents/{id}/pause correctly requires master/admin role (403 for tecnico)
POST /api/agents/{id}/activate works and persists in agent_states collection
GET /api/agents/{id}/timeline returns audit_logs with tool/resultado filters working
GET /api/agents/{id}/config returns rate_limit_soft/hard, system_prompt_default+effective, override flag, history, scopes, tools
POST /api/agents/{id}/config validates hard>=soft and persists in mcp_rate_limits and agent_overrides
GET /api/agents/panel/metrics returns por_agente, top_tools, por_dia, top_errors for configurable days
GET /api/agents/panel/pending-approvals returns empty queue (placeholder ready for future approval flows)
Frontend AgentesPanel.jsx displays all 8 agent cards with emoji, badge estado, metrics, buttons
Agent detail Sheet has 5 tabs: ¿Qué hace?, Actividad, Tareas, Config, Cola - all functional
Wizard '¿Qué puedo hacer?' shows 6 use cases that navigate to /crm/agente-aria with agent+prompt params
Auto-refresh 60s implemented via setInterval in useEffect
Role check uses user.role (English) correctly per agent_to_agent_context_note
seed_data_creation: Rate limits and system prompt overrides created during testing (cleaned up)
context_for_next_testing_agent: MCP_ENV=preview active. Agents panel at /crm/agentes fully functional. 8 agents defined in agent_defs.py: kpi_analyst, auditor, supervisor_cola, iso_officer, finance_officer, gestor_siniestros, triador_averias, seguimiento_publico. Pending approvals queue is empty by design (no approval flow generates items yet). Agent states stored in agent_states collection, rate limits in mcp_rate_limits, prompt overrides in agent_overrides. Audit logs in audit_logs collection with timestamp_dt for date queries.

mocked_apis_list: GLS SOAP preview - generates deterministic codexp/codplaza_dst
MRW SOAP preview - generates M+11 digits num_envio

tests: Each agent has agent_id, nombre, descripcion, emoji, estado, tools_count, acciones_hoy, tasa_exito_7d
Resumen has total_agentes=8, acciones_hoy, errores_24h, agente_mas_activo, aprobaciones_pendientes, tareas_proximas_24h
Returns por_agente with agent_id, total, errores, tasa_exito
Returns top_tools with agent_id, tool, total
Each card has emoji, ACTIVO badge, metrics (Hoy, Éxito 7d, Tools)
Summary cards (Acciones hoy, Errores 24h, Aprobaciones pendientes, Tareas 24h, Más activo)
5 tabs: ¿Qué hace?, Actividad, Tareas, Config, Cola
Config tab has rate limit inputs and edit prompt button
GLS tab loads with credentials and remitente form
